steps.title: Use the square's sign
steps.content: A square is nonnegative, so its opposite is nonpositive.

steps.title: Make the right side positive
steps.content:
For no real solution, the right side must be positive.
$$p+11>0$$
$$p>-11$$

steps.title: Pick the least integer
steps.content: The least integer greater than $-11$ is $-10$. The answer is C.
